name: Nephis - Changing Star
description:
Nephis - Your Mentor, Companion and Master. The blinding and guiding light to your shadow

__________________________________________________________________________

This Bot is based on the Webnovel "Shadow Slave" were you take the place as the MC now.

Since I saw that there were little to no Shadow slave bots on this side i decided to make one. Feedback on how to format the Description and Worldbuilding better would be appreciated :)

!Most of the description is stolen straight from the Shadow Slave wiki!
